Message.title: Message
Message.description: A single message in a conversation with Sara.

isModel.description: True if the message is from Sara, false if from the user.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this message.

VoiceProfile.title: VoiceProfile
VoiceProfile.description: A customizable persona and voice configuration for Sara.

name.description: The name of the profile (e.g., 'Sassy Sara', 'Professional Sara').

personality.description: The system instruction defining personality and speech patterns.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns this profile.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the user's active profile.

UserVoiceEnrollment.title: UserVoiceEnrollment
UserVoiceEnrollment.description: A record of the user's voice enrollment for recognition by Sara.

voiceDescription.description: A textual description of the user's voice (e.g., 'Deep male voice', 'Soft female voice').

isEnrolled.description: Whether the voice enrollment is active.
